## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `ruff check arcana tests` and `ruff format --check arcana tests` locally.
- [ ] I ran `pytest` locally and the suite passes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change (when applicable).
- [ ] I updated `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible behavior changed.
- [ ] I did **not** introduce any hard-coded secrets, tokens, or personal handles.
